titles.title: Supporting the designation of April 29, 2026, as "Denim Day" and honoring survivors of sexual assault.
Supporting the designation of April 29, 2026, as "Denim Day" and honoring survivors of sexual assault.

action.text: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committee on Rules, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.

Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary, and in addition to the Committee on Rules, for a period to be subsequently determined by the Speaker, in each case for consideration of such provisions as fall within the jurisdiction of the committee concerned.
